comment: DESI DR2 (2025, arXiv:2503.14738) CPL w0-wa best fits for DESI BAO + CMB + one supernova compilation at a time. The three SN compilations (Pantheon+, Union3, DESY5) OVERLAP heavily (shared low-z SNe) and are ALTERNATIVE datasets, not independent -- they must NOT be stacked/multiplied. rho is the published-typical (w0,wa) CPL correlation.

tfpt_prediction.note: cosmological constant: w=-1 exactly (Lambda/H0 engine, S_dS rho_Lambda = 32 pi^4)

overlap_note: Pantheon+, Union3 and DES-SN5YR share substantial low-z SNe; their w0-wa constraints are correlated, so combining them as if independent (e.g. sqrt(sum of sigma^2)) manufactures a spurious >5 sigma. Headline = strongest single overlap-aware combination, not a product.
